name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Cash America Pawn Azle, Texas — FirstCash is the leading international pawn operator with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, the UK, and Latin Amer...
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store chain with over 3,300 retail locations. The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers who need fast access to liquidity. FirstCash's primary business model centers on pawn lending—customers pledge personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, etc.) as collateral for non-recourse loans, meaning borrowers have no obligation beyond forfeiting the pledged item if they cannot repay. The company also operates a retail merchandise business, buying and selling a wide variety of goods across multiple categories.

FirstCash offers several distinct services beyond traditional pawn loans. Core offerings include pawn loans secured by pledged personal property, retail buying and selling of merchandise, gold and precious metal purchasing, and a layaway service requiring only 10% down payment. Their services are designed for speed and accessibility—customers can receive cash on the spot for items sold or pledge items for immediate loans without extensive credit checks. The company also operates AFF, a wholly-owned subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations.

What distinguishes FirstCash is its scale and international reach. With over 3,300 locations spanning 29 U.S. states, Washington D.C., the United Kingdom, Mexico (all states), Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador, FirstCash operates at a scale no other pawn operator matches. The company is publicly traded and included in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, employing approximately 22,000 people. Their retail merchandise model—buying and selling everything from jewelry to sporting goods—creates a dual revenue stream beyond lending alone.

For consumers, FirstCash provides legitimate collateral-based lending without credit checks or income verification, making it accessible for credit-constrained individuals facing immediate cash needs. However, pawn loans carry high effective interest rates (though technically non-recourse), and borrowers risk permanent loss of sentimental or valuable items if unable to repay within the loan term. The service is best suited for those with valuable possessions they can pledge temporarily and a genuine ability to repay within the typical 30-90 day loan periods.
pros: Immediate cash availability with no credit checks or income verification required
Non-recourse loans—no debt obligations if the pledge is forfeited, protecting credit scores
Over 3,300 locations across 29 U.S. states plus international presence for broad accessibility
Accepts diverse collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, sporting goods, appliances)
Layaway service available with only 10% down payment for retail purchases
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) providing operational stability and transparency
Fast transaction process with cash paid on the spot for item purchases
cons: High effective interest rates on pawn loans compared to traditional lending products
Risk of permanent loss of pledged items if loan cannot be repaid within the term
Limited to customers with valuable physical possessions to pledge as collateral
Retail merchandise inventory varies by location, limiting predictability of available goods
Non-recourse status doesn't protect items of sentimental value that cannot be replaced
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs and valuable personal property to pledge as collateral
Credit-constrained individuals who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or credit lines
Those seeking short-term bridge financing (30-90 days) with a clear ability to repay
Bargain hunters and resale shoppers looking for discounted retail merchandise and used goods
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for credit-constrained consumers facing immediate cash needs who have valuable personal property to pledge as collateral. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry high effective interest rates and borrowers risk permanent loss of pledged items if unable to repay within the typical loan term—this is a legitimate lending option but not a solution for long-term financial problems or credit building.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property
Retail buying and selling of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and instruments
Gold, silver, and precious metal purchasing for immediate cash
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Store locator tool to find nearest location
Online inventory browsing and merchandise discovery
AFF lease-to-own payment solutions through 15,000+ retail merchant partners
Cash payment on the spot for items purchased
Non-recourse pawn lending with no credit requirements
